name: yarr-mcp
description: MCP bridge to the yarr media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Jellyfin, qBittorrent, and more) for Gemini CLI. Also bundles standalone per-service skills (sonarr, radarr, prowlarr, overseerr, sabnzbd, qbittorrent, plex, jellyfin, tautulli, tracearr, bazarr) that drive each service's REST API directly as an offline fallback when the MCP server is unavailable.
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of an optionally self-hosted MCP HTTP server, used only by the health monitor script — not by the MCP connection itself (mcpServers.yarr uses stdio through the pinned yarr-mcp npm launcher). Keep http://localhost:40070 for local use; set to https://yarr.tootie.tv for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for the optional self-hosted MCP HTTP server (see server_url). Not used by the stdio MCP connection. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: yarr_services
settings.description: Comma-separated Yarr services to configure. Maps to YARR_SERVICES.

settings.name: sonarr_url
settings.description: Sonarr base URL. Maps to YARR_SONARR_URL.

settings.name: sonarr_api_key
settings.description: Sonarr API key. Maps to YARR_SONARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: radarr_url
settings.description: Radarr base URL. Maps to YARR_RADARR_URL.

settings.name: radarr_api_key
settings.description: Radarr API key. Maps to YARR_RADARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: prowlarr_url
settings.description: Prowlarr base URL. Maps to YARR_PROWLARR_URL.

settings.name: prowlarr_api_key
settings.description: Prowlarr API key. Maps to YARR_PROWLARR_API_KEY.

settings.name: overseerr_url
settings.description: Overseerr base URL. Maps to YARR_OVERSEERR_URL.

settings.name: overseerr_api_key
settings.description: Overseerr API key. Maps to YARR_OVERSEERR_API_KEY.

settings.name: jellyfin_url
settings.description: Jellyfin base URL. Maps to YARR_JELLYFIN_URL.

settings.name: jellyfin_api_key
settings.description: Jellyfin API key. Maps to YARR_JELLYFIN_API_KEY.

settings.name: plex_url
settings.description: Plex Media Server base URL. Maps to YARR_PLEX_URL.

settings.name: plex_token
settings.description: Plex authentication token (X-Plex-Token). Maps to YARR_PLEX_TOKEN.

settings.name: qbittorrent_url
settings.description: qBittorrent Web UI base URL. Maps to YARR_QBITTORRENT_URL.

settings.name: qbittorrent_username
settings.description: qBittorrent Web UI login username. Maps to YARR_QBITTORRENT_USERNAME.

settings.name: qbittorrent_password
settings.description: qBittorrent Web UI login password. Maps to YARR_QBITTORRENT_PASSWORD.

settings.name: sonarr_default_quality_profile
settings.description: Quality profile id the bundled sonarr fallback skill uses when adding series.

settings.name: radarr_default_quality_profile
settings.description: Quality profile id the bundled radarr fallback skill uses when adding movies.

settings.name: sabnzbd_url
settings.description: SABnzbd base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080. Maps to YARR_SABNZBD_URL / SABNZBD_URL.

settings.name: sabnzbd_api_key
settings.description: SABnzbd API key (Config -> General).

settings.name: tautulli_url
settings.description: Tautulli base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:8181. Maps to YARR_TAUTULLI_URL / TAUTULLI_URL.

settings.name: tautulli_api_key
settings.description: Tautulli API key (Settings -> Web Interface).

settings.name: tracearr_url
settings.description: Tracearr base URL for its public API, e.g. http://localhost:3000.

settings.name: bazarr_url
settings.description: Bazarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:6767. Maps to YARR_BAZARR_URL / BAZARR_URL.

settings.name: bazarr_api_key
settings.description: Bazarr API key (Settings -> General -> Security).
